title: BOLSIUS Velvet Red Rustic Shine Pillar Candle 13cm x 7cm
features: Candle Design: A rustic pillar candle with a velvet red rustic shine, inspired by the colors and textures of nature
Performance: With a large flame and soft light, this candle provides long burn time, creating a cozy atmosphere in any environment
Versatile Usage: Perfect for home fragrance, relaxation, and decoration, suitable for all seasons and unisex
Product Details: Unscented, round in shape, 13cm in height and 6.8cm in diameter, with a single wick
Safe to Use: Comes with safety instructions, including keeping away from flammable materials, never leaving it unattended, and properly disposing of remnants
description: Product Description About Bolsius Pillar Candles This new rustic candle range from Bolsius is inspired by the colors and textures of nature. Free from palm oil or animal fat, they’re made with a plant based wax and a cotton wick. On top of that, these new renewed rustic candles now burns even longer. With a large flame and soft light, these Bolsius Rustic Pillar Candles bring atmosphere to any environment. Size: 13cm x 6.8cm Fragrance: Unscented Safety Warning Keep away from flammable materials, never leave unattended, monitor burn time, and properly dispose of remnants.
